response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly accomplished full-stack and web engineer whose career is built almost entirely on TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies — a profile that does not align with the mandatory requirements of this role. C++ experience is limited to approximately six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and a bachelor's thesis project, falling dramatically short of the 5–10 years required. There is no evidence of Windows-platform C++ development, no SQL Server or Oracle experience, and no capital markets or fixed income domain knowledge. His one fintech-adjacent role (RIDE Capital) was conducted entirely in Node/TypeScript/GraphQL, not in financial systems C++ development.
strengths: Demonstrated CI/CD and DevOps experience, which is listed as a desirable optional skill
Java background from Altom Consulting satisfies one optional desirable skill
Strong communication skills evidenced by public talks, workshops, and technical writing
concerns: C++ experience is negligible (~6 months in 2014–2015) versus the mandatory 5–10 years required
No Windows-platform development background; career is predominantly Linux and web-based
Zero capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain expertise in any development capacity
